creator: knezour@weboutsourcing.cz
text:
After installation of the package pkg-message is shown, stating besides other

Initial password for first time use of MySQL is saved in $HOME/.mysql_secret
ie. when you want to use "mysql -u root -p" first you should see password
in /root/.mysql_secret

however this file doesn't exists and root user can log into DB without password.

Fresh 11.1 installation, uname -a
FreeBSD machine-name 11.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE #0 r321309: Fri Jul 21 02:08:28 UTC 2017     root@releng2.nyi.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

mysql56-server-5.6.39
